faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HOOKLY

items.question: How does HOOKLY verify freelancers?
items.answer: Every freelancer goes through a multi-step verification process including identity verification, skill assessments, and portfolio review. Only the top 10% of applicants are accepted.

items.question: What are the platform fees?
items.answer: HOOKLY charges a flat 10% fee on successful projects. There are no hidden fees, and posting projects is completely free.

items.question: How does the escrow system work?
items.answer: When you hire a freelancer, funds are held securely in escrow. Payment is only released when you approve the deliverables, protecting both parties.

items.question: Can I hire for ongoing projects?
items.answer: Yes! HOOKLY supports both one-time projects and ongoing engagements. You can set up recurring milestones and payments.

items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the work?
items.answer: Our satisfaction guarantee means you can request revisions or dispute the work. Our support team will help mediate and find a fair solution.
